author: anon-ab6221f8
content:
Shipped in 3576eae8. User called out the anti-pattern correctly — self-exe pin meant 'cargo install crosslink' didn't actually update dashboard subprocess behaviour. Now resolve_crosslink_bin() prefers PATH (canonical installed shape), falls back to self-exe only for dev workflows, with CROSSLINK_BIN env override for advanced cases.

Also fixed the FK constraint bug in untrack_with_path that was blocking cleanup of orphaned rows: the actions audit table FK to projects(id) had no ON DELETE clause, so projects with any dashboard-initiated writes (close/comment/lock/etc.) couldn't be untracked at all. Now NULLs out actions.project_id in a transaction before dropping the project row — audit history preserved as orphan rows.

Grid is now clean: dollspace-gay/OpenClaudia, dollspace-gay/ferrotorch, forecast-bio/crosslink. Ready for the user to re-add forecast-bio repos via the new Clone & Track form (which defaults to $HOME).
